bullets: Sole architect of OpenVibe — a 15-microservice open-source platform kernel: event bus, OIDC/OAuth2 identity, media storage, live-streaming ingest/restream, real-time chat, billing ledger, and AI/search backbone. A self-hosted alternative to Twitch + YouTube + Patreon + Discord.

Built and operated HoboStreamer — a full live-streaming platform with WebRTC, HLS, multi-destination RTMP restream, auto-recorded VODs, clips, real-time chat, voice channels, and moderation tools. Fully open source.

Built HoboQuest — a browser MMORPG on a custom isomorphic engine: shared game logic compiled to both server and client, Source Engine-style lag compensation, and four live game worlds. Playable in a tab, streamed live inside HoboStreamer.
Ran hobo.tools — shared SSO/OAuth2 identity and service registry connecting 14 services.
